summary: Planned conservative non-mutating classifications for five open PRs in a live inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned.

actions.reason: Useful active contributor PR with proof and maintainer-review signal; keep it open as independent inventory work rather than closing or merging.
Related session-lock follow-up with failed proof; no safe close or fixed-by-candidate action is supported.
Maintainer-owned active PR with broad compatibility surface and failing checks in the hydrated artifact; keep open as independent work.
Plausible implementation for a hydrated open issue, but failed checks and proof/product-decision labels block closure or fixed-by-candidate treatment.
Draft maintainer-owned work in progress with explicit waiting-on-author status; keep open as independent inventory work.
